title: Surgeon Vacancy at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies!
